issues.description: Action type 'PlayFromHand' is incorrect. The card effect adds opponent's Characters to Life cards, not plays them from hand. Should use 'AddToLife' or similar; 'PlayFromHand' implies playing a card from player's own hand.
Filter targets player's own cards ('your'). Effect must target opponent's Characters. Filter should specify opponent scope and Character type.
Second effect with 'Trigger' + 'FlipLife' is incorrect. The card does not flip Life cards; it adds Characters to Life cards face-up. This action misrepresents the mechanic entirely.
No action exists in standard DSL to 'add a card to Life cards'. This effect requires a custom action type not in the provided vocabulary, or the DSL structure is insufficient for this card mechanic.
